src/main/java/maven/Client.java.general_idea: Replaced raw text socket communication with a structured object serialization protocol using a custom Packet class.
src/main/java/maven/Client.java.human_impl: Replaced BufferedReader/DataOutputStream logic with ObjectOutputStream writing a Packet object.

src/main/java/maven/Client.java.general_idea: Added dependency on java.io.ObjectOutputStream to support object serialization.
Added dependency on java.util.HashMap to construct request headers.
Adopted Java 10+ local variable type inference (var) for cleaner code.
src/main/java/maven/Client.java.human_impl: var body = String.format(...); var headers = new HashMap...;

src/main/java/maven/Client.java.general_idea: Updated array declaration syntax from legacy C-style to standard Java style.
src/main/java/maven/Client.java.human_impl: String[] args instead of String argv[]

src/main/java/maven/Client.java.general_idea: Changed hardcoded server IP to localhost and dynamic port constant.

src/main/java/maven/Coll.java.general_idea: Added imports for HashMap and TreeMap to support the new collection usage in the main method.
Removed the 'final' modifier from the main method's args parameter, likely to align with modern coding conventions or IDE defaults.
Introduced a TreeMap instance populated with integer-string pairs to demonstrate ordered map functionality.
src/main/java/maven/Coll.java.human_impl: var data = new TreeMap<Integer, String>(); data.put(1, "one"); ...

src/main/java/maven/Coll.java.general_idea: Introduced a HashMap instance populated with integer-string pairs to demonstrate unordered map functionality.
src/main/java/maven/Coll.java.human_impl: var tbl = new HashMap<Integer, String>(); tbl.put(1, "one"); ...

src/main/java/maven/Coll.java.general_idea: Added a call to putIfAbsent on the HashMap to demonstrate conditional insertion logic.
Added a print statement to output the value associated with key 2 in the HashMap for verification.

src/main/java/maven/Command.java.general_idea: Replace the Windows-specific directory listing command with a Unix-compatible command.
src/main/java/maven/Command.java.human_impl: Changed runtime.exec argument from "cmd /c dir" to "find".

src/main/java/maven/Downloader.java.general_idea: Refactor manual resource closing of RandomAccessFile and InputStream into a try-with-resources block for automatic cleanup.
Replace explicit type declarations with the 'var' keyword for local variables to reduce verbosity.
Replace direct URL constructor with URI.create().toURL() to handle URL parsing more robustly.
Replace custom fatal error exit with standard stack trace printing for IOExceptions.
Comment out the check for content length less than 1 to allow downloads of empty or unknown size files.

src/main/java/maven/Loader.java.general_idea: Added import for java.net.URI to support the new URL construction method.
Replaced direct URL constructor with URI.create().toURL() pattern, likely to handle encoding or strictness, though currently using an empty string.
Replaced explicit type declarations with 'var' for local variables to utilize Java 10+ local variable type inference.
Renamed 'in' to 'reader' and 'fos' to 'writer' for better semantic clarity.
Increased the I/O buffer size from 1024 bytes to 4096 bytes (1 << 12) for potential performance improvement.
Removed the System.out.println statement that confirmed the download completion.

src/main/java/maven/Main.java.general_idea: Introduce a Java record to encapsulate data, utilizing a feature available since Java 16.
Add import for HashSet to support collection usage in the main method.
Implement a method to print a 2D integer array with box-drawing characters for better readability.
Add logic to calculate the maximum consecutive sequence of 1s in an integer array.
Add empty or placeholder methods for future implementation or testing.
src/main/java/maven/Main.java.human_impl: public void draw(int[][] data) {} public int max(int[] data, int i) { return 0; } public int max(int[][] data) { return 0; }

src/main/java/maven/Main.java.general_idea: Refactor main method to instantiate the class and execute new utility methods instead of just printing a string.
Use the 'var' keyword for local variable type inference, a feature introduced in Java 10.
src/main/java/maven/Main.java.human_impl: var main = new Main(); var set = new HashSet<Integer>();

src/test/java/maven/AppTest.java.general_idea: Removed the placeholder JUnit 5 test method and its associated imports from the test class.
src/test/java/maven/AppTest.java.human_impl: Deleted `@Test public void shouldAnswerWithTrue() { assertTrue(true); }` and related imports.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Maven compiler release property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
Add Apache POI library for handling Microsoft Office documents.
Add JavaFaker library for generating fake data.
Add JUnit 3 library, likely for legacy test compatibility or specific test cases.
Add Apache PDFBox library for creating and manipulating PDF documents.
Add MongoDB Java Driver for synchronous database operations.
Add OpenCSV library for reading and writing CSV files.
Add HikariCP for high-performance JDBC connection pooling.
Add JSch library for SSH2 protocol implementation.
Add Apache MINA SSHD core library for SSH server/client functionality.
Add Spring Web module for building web applications.
Add JJWT API for creating and validating JSON Web Tokens.
Add JJWT implementation dependency for runtime JWT processing.
Add JJWT Jackson dependency for JSON serialization/deserialization.
Add Lombok library to reduce boilerplate code in Java classes.
Add Jedis client for interacting with Redis databases.
Remove JUnit Jupiter API dependency, possibly replaced by JUnit 3 or other testing frameworks.
Remove JUnit Jupiter Params dependency, possibly replaced by JUnit 3 or other testing frameworks.
Remove JUnit BOM dependency management block.
Remove explicit plugin management versions for standard Maven plugins.
Configure Maven compiler plugin to disable annotation processing.
